title: The 7 Best Herbal Essential Oils for Cough
description: Rosmarinus officinalis essential oil, also known as rosemary oil, has several benefits for a cough. The oil contains compounds that help to loosen and clear mucus from the airways. This makes it easier to breathe and can help to reduce congestion. Rosemary oil also has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe an irritated throat and reduce swelling. Additionally, its decongestant properties can help to open up airways, allowing for better airflow and reducing coughing. Th...
